output.title: Implement Exponential Backoff and Dead-Letter Queue for Payment Webhook
output.summary: This PR introduces a retry policy for the payment webhook handler, implementing exponential backoff for transient failures and persisting failed events to a dead-letter queue. Additionally, retry metrics will be emitted for observability.
changes: Added exponential backoff retry mechanism to the payment webhook handler.
Implemented dead-letter queue handling for failed payment events.
testPlan: Test that the webhook handler retries processing a payment event up to 5 times for transient failures.
Verify that failed payment events are correctly published to the dead-letter queue.
Ensure that retry metrics are emitted during the retry process.
Confirm that no duplicate charges occur when replaying events from the dead-letter queue.
risks: Potential for increased load on the system during peak traffic if retries are triggered frequently.
Need to ensure that the dead-letter queue is monitored and processed to avoid message accumulation.
output.rolloutNotes: Monitor the performance of the payment webhook handler after deployment, especially during peak traffic times, to ensure that the retry mechanism and dead-letter handling are functioning as expected.

output.title: Add retry policy for payment webhook processing
output.summary: This pull request implements a retry policy for processing payment webhooks, incorporating exponential backoff and dead-letter queue handling for failed events.
changes: Added exponential backoff retry mechanism for processing payment events.
Implemented dead-letter queue handling for events that fail after retries.
testPlan: Verify that the webhook handler retries transient failures up to 5 times.
Ensure that failed events are correctly persisted to the dead-letter queue.
Check that retry metrics are emitted for observability.
Test that no duplicate charge side effects occur on replay of events.
risks: Potential for increased load on the system during peak traffic if retries are triggered frequently.
Need to ensure that the dead-letter queue is monitored and processed appropriately to avoid data loss.
output.rolloutNotes: Monitor the performance of the webhook handler post-deployment to ensure that the retry mechanism is functioning as expected and that no duplicate charges occur.
